---
title: "19 Plot Top and Bottom Stock Performers"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
 # Intent: visualize top 5 and bottom 5 performers by 10-year percent change.
      # The ggplot call is intentionally imperfect with geom_bar mapping setup.
  top5 <-stock_10yr %>% arrange(desc(pct_change_10y)) %>% slice(1:5)
    bot5<- stock_10yr %>% arrange(pct_change_10y) %>% slice(1:5)

 plot_df<- bind_rows(top5,bot5)  %>%
   mutate(group = ifelse(pct_change_10y >= 0, "Top", "Bottom"))

    ggplot(plot_df, aes(x= reorder(symbol, pct_change_10y), y= symbol, fill= group)) +
geom_bar() +
 coord_flip() +
   labs(title = "Top and Bottom 10-Year Price Performers",
  x = "Ticker", y = "10Y % Change")
```
